scripts.pods: bundle install && (cd ios && bundle exec pod install)
scripts.bundle:ios: react-native bundle --entry-file index.js --platform ios --dev false --bundle-output ios/main.jsbundle --assets-dest ios
scripts.build:ios: npm run bundle:ios && xcodebuild -workspace ios/AXeTypeScriptReactNativeSample.xcworkspace -scheme AXeTypeScriptReactNativeSample -configuration Release -sdk iphonesimulator -derivedDataPath build/ios build
scripts.app:install: test -n "$SIMULATOR_UDID" && xcrun simctl install "$SIMULATOR_UDID" build/ios/Build/Products/Release-iphonesimulator/AXeTypeScriptReactNativeSample.app && xcrun simctl launch "$SIMULATOR_UDID" dev.axetypescript.sample
